name: Nero Wolfe's Yorkshire Buck
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in the top of a double boiler.
2. Add the grated Cheshire cheese to the melted butter, stirring constantly until it begins to melt.
3. Slowly add the ale while continuing to stir.
4. Beat 1 egg and add it to the mixture along with the salt, dry mustard, and Tabasco.
5. Stir continuously until all ingredients are well combined and the mixture is smooth, indicating that the cheese has fully melted.
6. Reduce the heat to low and keep the sauce warm.
7. Poach the remaining 6 eggs in a separate pot or pan.
8. Fry the Canadian back bacon on a griddle until crispy.
9. Split and toast the English muffins.
10. Spread each muffin with a thin layer of Dijon mustard.
11. Assemble each serving by placing a muffin, pouring some melted cheese over it, topping with a slice of cooked bacon, a poached egg, and additional melted cheese.
12. Serve immediately while hot. Optionally, broil the assembled plates briefly to lightly brown the tops of the English muffins for added texture.
